---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `armoury ...`
2. Navigate to tab ...
3. Press key ...
4. See error / unexpected behaviour

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any terminal output or error messages.

## Environment

- **Laptop model**: (e.g. ASUS TUF Gaming A15 FA506NFR)
- **CPU / GPU**: (e.g. AMD Ryzen 7 7435HS / NVIDIA RTX 2050)
- **Distro & kernel**: (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, kernel 6.17)
- **asusd version**: (run `asusctl --version` or `pacman -Q asusctl`)
- **armoury-tui version**: (run `armoury --version`)

## `--probe` output

```
(paste the output of `armoury --probe` here)
```

## Additional context

Any other details, screenshots, or terminal recordings.
